Query
  Let $errs
    Pipeline
      From
        Source main
      Stage where
        Binary ==
          Ident level
          String "ERROR"
  Pipeline
    From
      Source $errs
    Stage extend
      Assign is_50x
        Call if
          Binary >=
            Ident status
            Int 500
          String "yes"
          String "no"
    Stage stats
      Aggs
        Agg
          Call count
      By
        Ident is_50x
    Stage sort
      SortKey +
        Ident is_50x
